feedback_items.title: Improve System Status Feedback
feedback_items.description: The current UI lacks comprehensive feedback mechanisms for ongoing processes and user actions.
action_steps: Implement loading indicators for all data fetching operations.
Enhance active states for tabs and buttons.
Provide confirmation feedback for actions like Package Upgrade and Pay.

feedback_items.title: Introduce Efficiency Features for Expert Users
feedback_items.description: The interface does not appear to offer features that cater to experienced users.
action_steps: Allow dashboard customization in future versions.

feedback_items.title: Enhance Error Recognition, Diagnosis, and Recovery
feedback_items.description: The current design does not explicitly outline how system or data-related errors are communicated.
feedback_items.heuristic_violation_name: Help users recognize, diagnose, and recover from errors

feedback_items.title: Integrate Comprehensive Help and Documentation
feedback_items.description: The UI analysis indicates a lack of easily accessible help features.
action_steps: Add an accessible Help or FAQ section.

summary: The application has a strong foundation with good aesthetic design, consistency, and clear navigation, but significant improvements are needed in system feedback, efficiency, error handling, and help documentation.
